title: Spanish Tortilla with Intense Spicy Sauce
description: A twist on the classic Spanish tortilla, served with a spicy sauce that will awaken your taste buds.
instructions: 1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the diced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
4. Slice the tortilla into thin strips and add to the skillet. Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the tortilla is crispy.
5. In a bowl, whisk together the espanola and mustardy sauce. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
6. To assemble the dish, place the crispy tortilla strips on a plate, then spoon the spicy sauce over the top.
8. Note: You can adjust the level of spiciness to your liking by adding more or less espanola.
9. This dish is best served fresh, but it can be refrigerated for up to a day and reheated in the oven.
10. Enjoy your delicious Spanish tortilla with intense spicy sauce!
